intelligent_resolution.original_description: AI Resume Chat Interface - An interactive chat application that uses AI/LLM technology to analyze and present resume information. Users can ask questions about a candidate's background, experience, skills, and qualifications. The system provides intelligent responses about career information, generates professional CVs, and offers job matching analysis. It's designed for recruiters, HR professionals, and job seekers to interact with resume data through natural language queries.

resolved_parameters.system_description: AI Resume Chat Interface - An interactive chat application that uses AI/LLM technology to analyze and present resume information.
